comment.body:
In my world, there was a huge gap on ES/NQ and we are filling that now. That also trapped bulls - giving their stop losses to feed for the bears. 
But I think this is a simple ABC, so probably up soon and then only Trump knows what the market will do :)

comment.body:
lower gamma = less resistance = higher realized intraday vol potential.
ICs don't like higher vol
